case_title: HERNANDEZ, ANA TERESA VS GOLDEN STATE 4 HOUR CLEANERS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $350.00 FILED BY HERNANDEZ, ANA TERESA AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE 4 HOUR CLEANERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
CERTIFIED MAIL TO GOLDEN STATE DRY CLEANER RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, ANA TERESA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE 4 HOUR CLEANERS DEFT WAIVES $35 CLEANING CHARGE AND COAT TO BE RETURNED TO PLFT WITHOUT CHARGE UPON DEMAND. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
